ro: a nu exista, a nu fi
en: to not exist, to not have
to find out, to look into
to promise, to make an appointment
to arise, to come into existence
to be blocked, to be stuck
to take charge of, to be in charge
to keep, to guard, to protect
to take a photo, to stamp

ro: a reuși, a duce la bun sfârșit
a se supăra, a se înfuria
a suna, a face să sune
a se recupera, a se face bine
a fi la fel, a părea
en: to be the same, to seem
to contact, to get in touch

ro: a ruga, a cere un favor
a se certa, a se lupta

en: to calculate, to pay the bill

ro: a urca în mijloc de transport
a coborî din mijloc de transport
en: to get off, to get out

ro: a se trezi, a se ridica
en: to wake up, to get up
to take care of, to look after

ro: a fi greu, a fi grelos
a fi ușor, a fi lejer
a fi moale, a fi lin
a fi tare, a fi rigid
a fi arătos, a fi mișto

en: by any chance, just in case

ro: a se strica, a se rupe
en: to break down, to get damaged

ro: a fi admis, a intra la
a-și găsi un loc de muncă

en: to get hurt, to be injured

ro: a fi atent, a fi precaut

en: to suit, to match, to fit
to be wrong, to be mistaken

ro: a fi corect, a se potrivi

en: for the sake of, in order to

ro: a pregăti, a lua cu sine
a se culca, a se întinde

en: to like, to appeal to you

ro: a fi norocos, a fi bine că
en: to be fortunate, what a relief
to go to the gym regularly

ro: a se simți odihnit și proaspăt
